ai_narrative: James has been a consistent Leadership-tier donor since 2018, though his FY2025 giving dipped 17% from his prior year. He has expressed deep connection to Water4's Ethiopia program. A face-to-face meeting before the year-end would be timely given his engagement history and the new East Africa impact report now available.
ask_rationale: At 87.5% of the Transformational threshold, James is a strong upgrade candidate. A $85K ask bridges the gap while acknowledging his YoY dip.

ai_narrative: Margaret is Water4's most engaged Transformational donor — a $50K annual giver since 2020 with an active $50K/year recurring pledge. Her tenure (10+ years) and 12 lifetime gifts signal deep mission alignment. The upcoming field visit opportunity to Uganda in April is ideal for deepening her connection.
ask_rationale: Margaret's giving has grown 11% YoY. A $75K ask acknowledges her trajectory while respecting her recurring commitment.

ai_narrative: Robert gave a $10K Major-tier gift in August 2024 but has not yet given in FY2025 (198 days since last gift). His 4-year tenure and consistent annual gifts suggest he intends to give again, but without outreach the risk of lapse is real. A personal call from Michael referencing the new community impact video would be timely.
ask_rationale: A $12,500 ask (25% above his last gift) is appropriate given his giving trajectory and Mid-Level to Major tier movement.

ai_narrative: Patricia's giving doubled YoY after she upgraded to a $5,000 monthly recurring gift in January 2025. At 7.2K in lifetime giving and strong engagement signals, she is a clear Mid-Level to Major tier upgrade candidate. A handwritten thank-you and a call inviting her to the spring donor briefing would reinforce her commitment.
ask_rationale: Patricia's YoY growth trajectory (127% increase) and new recurring commitment support a $10K ask — the entry threshold for Major tier.
